title: Erectile dysfunction documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports erectile-function onset, duration, rigidity, morning erections, desire, arousal, ejaculation, orgasm, relationship, treatment and symptom-impact documentation.

source.title: EAU Guidelines on Sexual and Reproductive Health — Management of Erectile Dysfunction
source.population: Adult men presenting with erectile dysfunction or related sexual-function concerns.
source.setting: Urology, sexual medicine and relevant endocrine assessment.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected medical, sexual, psychosocial, cardiovascular-risk, focused examination and clinician-reviewed laboratory documentation. It does not diagnose the cause, recommend treatment or define UAE referral pathways.

assessment.text: Supports focused genitourinary, endocrine, vascular and neurological examination, blood pressure, heart rate, BMI or waist, glucose, HbA1c, lipids, morning testosterone and selected hormone context.
assessment.rationale: Supports focused examination, cardiovascular observations and selected laboratory context for erectile dysfunction documentation; no decision is generated.

source.title: EAU Guidelines on Sexual and Reproductive Health — Management of Erectile Dysfunction
source.population: Adult men presenting with erectile dysfunction or related sexual-function concerns.
source.setting: Urology, sexual medicine and relevant endocrine assessment.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected medical, sexual, psychosocial, cardiovascular-risk, focused examination and clinician-reviewed laboratory documentation. It does not diagnose the cause, recommend treatment or define UAE referral pathways.

exact_location.heading: Sections 5.4.2–5.4.3 — physical examination and laboratory testing

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports focused genitourinary, endocrine, vascular and neurological examination, blood pressure, heart rate, BMI or waist, glucose, HbA1c, lipids, morning testosterone and selected hormone context.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-documented cardiovascular, mood, anxiety, life-stressor, relationship and psychosexual context without calculating risk or assigning cause.
assessment.rationale: Supports cardiovascular, mood, anxiety and psychosexual context for erectile dysfunction documentation; no decision is generated.
